name: Input

semanticTypeCandidates.evidence: Standard text field for forms and search
Search field with leading icon in dashboard header

representativeVariants.name: Text Input (default)
representativeVariants.whySelected: Core form input — flat dark surface with subtle border
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Label above: '用户名'; Placeholder text: '请输入用户名'

representativeVariants.name: Text Input (focus)
representativeVariants.whySelected: Focus state with warm orange ring — the brand accent on interaction

representativeVariants.name: Search Input
representativeVariants.whySelected: Search variant with leading magnifier icon — common in dashboard top nav

representativeVariants.name: Text Input (error)
representativeVariants.whySelected: Error state with red border and helper text — form validation feedback
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Label: '邮箱'; Input value: 'invalid'; Helper text below in error color: '请输入有效的邮箱地址'

anatomy.description: Optional text label above input, font-size caption, color muted-foreground
Rectangular input field, flat background, 1px border, sharp 4px radius
Optional helper text below field, font-size caption

structurePatterns: Flex column container for label + field + helper
Field: relative positioned for leading/trailing icon overlay
Icon: absolute positioned, 16px, left or right var(--space-3)

bestPractices: Always show label for form inputs
Use search variant in top navigation bar
Orange focus ring (2px rgba) for all interactive inputs
Error state: red border + helper text, no shadow

doNotInvent: Rounded pill inputs (brand uses sharp 4px radius)
Filled background inputs (brand uses border style)
unknowns: Exact focus ring opacity — infer 20% alpha of primary color
keyInsightSeed: Flat input with orange focus ring, sharp corners
